name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=True, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly changes the data preprocessing logic (conditional imputation), the validation strategy (LOMO instead of Repeated Stratified K-Fold), and the filtering/prioritization logic. While the overall goal is the same, the methodology has shifted enough that the previous execution results (models, metrics, plots) are likely incompatible with the new requirements. Therefore, it is safest to restart from the beginning to ensure consistency across the new workflow.
